INTERNATIONAL RELATIONS
YOUR RUNWAY FOR GLOBAL OPPORTUNITIES
CENTRE FOR INTERNATIONAL RELATIONS
Global experiences can open your eyes like never before. Meeting new students from different cultures,exchanging and brainstorming ideas, can create a huge shift in the way we perceive the world.  The Centre for International Relations enhances academic excellence through global collaboration offering Eshwarites, opportunities for international exposure and preparing the students and faculty members for a diverse and interconnected world. We also welcome students and faculty from overseas to come experience what it is like, to learn, or do research at our campus – be it for a short term internship  or a semester with us.
So come, let’s exchange an amalgam of ideas and culture, to truly experience the world, together!
50+ PARTNERSHIPS
WITH TOP UNIVERSITIES WORLDWIDE
50+
INTERNATIONAL INTERNSHIPS

INTERNATIONAL ADVISORY BOARD
Here is our tall line up of diverse and eminent international advisors who are an integral part of our Centre for International Relations. With their help, we gain critical insights into futuristic global trends in technology and research. They also help us gain important connections into the global arena so that we can provide the best global opportunities and exposure for our students.

GLOBAL ALLIANCES
NEW CONNECTIONS. NEW HORIZONS.
Sri Eshwar is going full throttle to make new connections with foreign universities to equip our students and faculty for the much-needed global exposure. Signing MOU is the first step to open the doors for international exchange. MOUs help facilitate the exchange of students for various programs and help gain valuable insights in problem solving and a rich cultural perspective.
With our overseas partner universities, the possibilities for students to gain exposure is limitless!
KNOW MORE
OUTWARD MOBILITY
Get set to fly off to gain global exposure - A value add to your career!
Get ready to take off your career by going international, to gain new exposure like never before! Meeting and exchanging ideas with people of new cultures help open our perspective to unimaginable heights. Outward Mobility enables students to visit foreign countries for varying periods of time to gain the much needed exposure and a global perspective.
SEMESTER ABROAD PROGRAM
INTERNATIONAL INTERNSHIPS
SUMMER/WINTER SCHOOL PROGRAM
KNOW MORE
INWARD MOBILITY
come! experience the Indian technical brilliance & rich culture!
Students wishing to make India a part of their academic pursuits, stop right here! Sri Eshwar offers Inward mobility programs that will give you a chance to work with some of the best researchers of the world, passionate faculty, and high quality students that will surely elevate your global exposure.You will surely be uplifted in your technical skills, problem solving approach, and at the same time appreciate our deep rooted culture and simple lifestyle!
You are sure to gain fresh perspectives and make some new friends for life, here at Sri Eshwar.
SEMESTER @ SRI ESHWAR

SRI ESHWAR SUMMER/WINTER
SCHOOL PROGRAM

INTERNATIONAL VISITING FACULTY
Esteemed international visiting faculty enhance our academic programs with specialized courses, guest lectures, and collaborative research projects, enriching students’ educational experiences. The following overseas professors/industry experts regularly conduct sessions for our students both in virtual and physical modes.

INTERNATIONAL RELATIONS EVENTS & VISITS
The Centre for International Relations (CIR) at Sri Eshwar highlights key global collaborations, student exchange programs, and leadership visits. This section showcases initiatives that strengthen ties with international institutions and promote global learning opportunities.
